content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be reframed as nested, self-specializing agent ecosystems, where each individual memory slot functions as a tiny active learning agent that selectively chooses what new information to integrate and which existing memory traces to update. This design leverages the curiosity-driven exploration dynamics that power modern curious RL agents to prioritize encoding surprising, useful information over redundant passive storage.
